_comment: CPI YoY 9.1% vs 8.6% consensus — peak inflation print (release 2022-07-13).

source.actual_release: CPI-U, All items, 12-month change — June 2022 release

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: SRS CLS-001 ECDF: |deviation|=|9.1-8.6|=0.5pp. All 30 historical surprise magnitudes in the window are ≤ 0.5 (max in window is 0.5, which ties), so ecdf_rank=30, severity=30/30=1.00. Peak-inflation event — the 0.5pp upside surprise matches the single largest historical surprise in the 30-month window. ECDF left-continuous convention: ties count (≤), so rank=30. The current tanh implementation (~0.87) understates. 1.00 is correct: this was a once-in-a-window extreme.
